text:
あなたが引き受けてくれさえすれば
もう手に入ったも同然ね！
フフッ、褒めすぎかしら？

あ。も、もちろん無理したり
そういうことはナシで。
出来る範囲でいいんだからね？

あなたを信じて待ってるから
今回もよろしく

I love when you take one of my requests.
It means the ingredient's on the way!
Hehe. Too much praise? I'll dial it back.

Oh, but just to be clear, I don't want you to
go way out on a limb or anything, you know?
Just do what you can handle!

Well, I know you're up to the task!
Good luck out there!
